title: crotalaria pisicarpa
intro: Crotalaria pisicarpa is a species of flowering plant in the legume family, native to tropical Asia. The plant has been traditionally used in medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Crotalaria pisicarpa include its potential to treat fever, cough, and respiratory problems, as well as its use as an antiseptic and antibacterial agent. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are used to treat various health conditions.
